subcodes.first_line: The evanescent servant maketh known that the tracings of the Most Luminous Pen, adorned with the lights of love for the Sovereign of Power, illumined both heart and vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض خادم فانی آنکه اثر کلک انور که مطرز بانوار حب مالک قدر بود ضیا بخش قلب و بصر
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
